briefdescription.para: 0x08 PCR log read request is invalid
0x09 SW PCR measurement index is invalid
0x0A SW PCR configuration is not done
0x0D SW PCR data is in upper DDR memory
0x25 Error when there is a invalid DEVAK request
0x28 Error when command length crossed chunk boundary
0x29 Error when updating secure eFuse configuration
0x2B Error when calculating secure state hash
0x2C Error when DME challenge request is made when DME response is already generated
0x2D Error when DME response not generated and CSR is requested
0x2E Error when public key is not available during keywrap attestation request
0x2F Error when invalid buffer size is provided during keywrap attestation request
0x30 Error when updating eFuse PPK configuration
0x31 Error when updating eFuse SPK Revocation configuration
0x32 Error when updating eFuse OffChip revocation configuration
0x33 Error when updating eFuse miscellaneous configuration
0x34 Error when reading PPK eFuse configuration
0x35 Error when reading SPK eFuse configuration
0x36 Error when reading Offchip revocation configuration
0x37 Error when extending PPK eFuse configuration
0x38 Error when extending SPK revocation eFuse configuration
0x39 Error when extending Offchip revocation eFuse configuration
0x3A Error when extending Miscellaneous eFuse configuration
0x3B Error when extending secure state configuration
Size of P384 public key in bytes.
Maximum number of hardware PCR events.
Length of SHA3 hash in bytes.
Number of bytes of PCR event ID.
Number of bytes of OCP version.
Macro to typecast XOCP API ID.
Mask for API ID in Secure IPI command.
Extended hash buffer size in bytes.
Extended hash buffer size in bits.
